rationale: The paper focuses on wireless communications, specifically Reconfigurable Intelligent Surfaces (RIS) and beam training in 6G networks, which is an entirely different domain from the user's question about Large Language Models (LLMs) and coding agents. The shared term "coded" refers to channel coding in physics/engineering rather than code generation or software engineering, constituting a distinct construct sharing only homonym keywords.
